headline: Support between sessions, not just in them
subtext: Stay connected to your practitioner on the days that count.
body: Recovery happens between appointments. Neurowaze keeps you and your practitioner in step all week.
caption:
Most of recovery happens in the days between appointments, exactly when people usually feel most alone with it.

Neurowaze keeps you connected. Your daily check-ins and progress are visible to your practitioner, so guidance is based on how your week actually went, not a snapshot from a fortnight ago. You stay supported through the flares and the wins alike.

For chronic pain, fibromyalgia, IBS, tinnitus and long COVID, that continuity turns isolated effort into a partnership.

See how it works at https://neurowaze.health/start-my-recovery

#ChronicPain #Neuroplasticity #Fibromyalgia #IBS #Tinnitus #LongCovid #MindBody #PainRecovery #Neurowaze
first_comment: On Neurowaze your check-ins and progress stay visible to your practitioner between sessions, so support is continuous. Explore it here: https://neurowaze.health/start-my-recovery
